title: Sequential smFISH Protocol
author: ZengU19 BICCN Grant
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y6nfzde

steps.title: 10-14 um cryosections are taken from...
steps.instruction: 10-14 um cryosections are taken from fresh-frozen tissue, which are collected on poly-lysinetreated #1 coverslips at room temperature (RT). After 5-10 min at RT, sections are placed at 4°C until sectioning is complete. At that point, proceed immediately to fixation and permeabilization. 00:05:00, RT

steps.title: Post-fix sections for 15 min with...
steps.instruction: Post-fix sections for 15 min with 4% PFA @ 4 °C. 4% PFA Contributed by users 00:15:00, Post-fixing Undetermined, Post-fixing

steps.title: Wash with PBS (1/3) PBS Contributed by users
steps.instruction: Wash with PBS (1/3) PBS Contributed by users

steps.title: Wash with PBS (2/3) PBS Contributed by users
steps.instruction: Wash with PBS (2/3) PBS Contributed by users

steps.title: Wash with PBS (3/3) PBS Contributed by users
steps.instruction: Wash with PBS (3/3) PBS Contributed by users

steps.title: Permeabilize with cold methanol at -20 C for 10 min
steps.instruction: Permeabilize with cold methanol at -20 C for 10 min. Undetermined, Permeabilizing 00:10:00, Permeabilizing

steps.title: Air dry for 30 min in fume hood (Stopping point
steps.instruction: Air dry for 30 min in fume hood (Stopping point: store coverslips at -80C) 00:30:00, Air drying

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: Treat sections with 8% SDS/PBS for 10 minutes, followed by 3 – 5 rinses with PBSor 2XSSC 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 2ml 2X SSC 2X SSC...
steps.instruction: Add 2ml 2X SSC 2X SSC Contributed by users undetermined, 2X SSC

steps.title: Pre-heat hyb oven to 37 °C Undetermined, oven
steps.instruction: Pre-heat hyb oven to 37 °C Undetermined, oven

steps.title: Place sections in hyb buffer without probes
steps.instruction: Place sections in hyb buffer without probes.

steps.title: Add 4 ul probe 400ul hyb buffer
steps.instruction: Add 4 ul probe 400ul hyb buffer. undetermined, probe undetermined, hyb buffer Specific to 6-well plate format – if using perfusion chamber, this volume can be reduced.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 C for 2H
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 C for 2H. Undetermined, Incubation 02:00:00, Incubation

steps.title: Add 2 ml wash buffer to each well
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml wash buffer to each well. undetermined, wash buffer

steps.title: Incubate at 37 C for 15 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 C for 15 min. Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation

steps.title: Remove wash buffer
steps.instruction: Remove wash buffer.

steps.title: Add 2 ml fresh wash buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml fresh wash buffer and incubate at 37 C for 15 min. undetermined, wash buffer Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation

steps.title: Replace wash buffer with fresh wash...
steps.instruction: Replace wash buffer with fresh wash buffer + DAPI (final 5ug/mL) and incubate at 37 C for 15 min. Undetermined, Incubation 00:15:00, Incubation

steps.title: GLOX buffer step if performing antibody stain
steps.instruction: GLOX buffer step if performing antibody stain

steps.title: Mount and image or store at...
steps.instruction: Mount and image or store at 4 C in 2XSSC until imaging session Undetermined 2X SSC Contributed by users

steps.title: 65% formamide/2X SSC, 10 min X...
steps.instruction: 65% formamide/2X SSC, 10 min X 3, 30 C 65% formamide/2X SSC Contributed by users 00:10:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Wash in 2XSSC (1/3)
steps.instruction: Wash in 2XSSC (1/3)

steps.title: Wash in 2XSSC (2/3)
steps.instruction: Wash in 2XSSC (2/3)

steps.title: Wash in 2XSSC (3/3)
steps.instruction: Wash in 2XSSC (3/3)

steps.title: Following stripping, proceed to hybridization step
steps.instruction: Following stripping, proceed to hybridization step. go to step #10
